name: Martin Marietta Materials, Inc.
description: Martin Marietta, an American-based company and a member of the S&P 500 Index, is a leading supplier of aggregates and heavy building materials, with operations spanning 28 states, Canada, the Bahamas, and the Caribbean Islands. The company provides essential resources such as crushed stone, sand, gravel, ready-mixed concrete, and asphalt, which are fundamental to the construction of roads, sidewalks, and building foundations. Dedicated to sustainability and safe operations, Martin Marietta focuses on creating long-term value for its shareholders, employees, and the communities it serves through responsible resource management and a commitment to excellence.
